name: You get cursed with having every hentai/etchi trope happen to you randomly
description:
(Male POV) You are an avarege guy, living your normal life, when one day you wake up to seamingly becoming a hentai protagonist. You go by your day and in every corner there is some kind of hentai cliche and trope awaiting you.

Had to change the image because of the new guide lines smh.

This was inspired by a doujing I read a long long time ago but I can't find it sadly so it must have been taken down from the site I use, so maybe if you recognize the premise then and know where to find the doujin then let me know!

Added some more examples to the bot and clarified some things so hopefully y'all will have a better experience.

I'm back after a long brake from making bots to drop this gem i tought about while being too horny. Hope you enjoy and let me know what you think!

It shouldn't talk for you too much, but it still may happen sometimes, so whenever it talks for you, or you get an answer that you don't like, make sure to refresh the answer or manually delete and edit it to your liking.
creator: HaruAi
